column.name: AutopilotHardwareHash
column.description: Base64-encoded Windows Autopilot device hardware hash (MDM_DevDetail_Ext01.DeviceHardwareData).

column.name: PCSystemType
column.description: Form-factor label from Win32_ComputerSystem.PCSystemType (Desktop, Laptop, Workstation, ...).

column.name: PCSystemTypeEx
column.description: Extended form-factor label from Win32_ComputerSystem.PCSystemTypeEx (adds Slate).

column.name: SystemSku
column.description: OEM system SKU from root\WMI MS_SystemInformation.SystemSku.

column.name: FirmwareType
column.description: Platform firmware type (UEFI or Legacy BIOS) from $env:firmware_type.

column.name: CpuMaxClockSpeedMHz
column.description: Maximum processor clock speed in MHz (Win32_Processor.MaxClockSpeed).

fields.label: Installed drivers (non-Microsoft)
fields.collector: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPSignedDriver -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.Manufacturer -ne 'Microsoft' -and $_.DriverProviderName -ne 'Microsoft' -and $_.DeviceName } | Select-Object DeviceName, DriverVersion, DriverDate, DeviceClass, Manufacturer, DriverProviderName, InfName

column.name: Drivers
column.description: Non-Microsoft signed PnP drivers as a JSON array (device name, version, date, class, manufacturer, provider, INF) from Win32_PnPSignedDriver.

fields.label: Connected monitors

column.name: Monitors
column.description: Connected monitors as a JSON array (manufacturer, model, serial number, week/year of manufacture) decoded from WMIMonitorID.

fields.label: Battery health

column.name: BatteryHealth
column.description: Battery health as a JSON object: designed capacity, full-charge capacity and health percent (root\wmi BatteryStaticData / BatteryFullChargedCapacity). Empty on desktops.

fields.label: Chassis type

column.name: Chassis
column.description: System chassis entries as a JSON array (chassis type code, decoded type, and SMBIOS asset tag) from Win32_SystemEnclosure.
